title: TeenyTale
description: This simple mod features Undertale! (but in plush form)
body:
# **Teeny Tale**
Like Undertale? This mod adds Undertale elements as decorative, cosmetic, or just plain stupid additions.

This mod adds:

- Sans Undertale
- Papyrus Undertale
- Four Music Discs
- One Painting
- Armors
- And much more to come!
